rationale: The citing paper note is focused on missing-attribute inference and behavioral assumptions in partial-profile conjoint (a conceptual commentary on BHH), whereas the cited paper note is about context-dependent compromise-effect choice models (CCM/NCCM/LAM/RAM). The citing note does not indicate use of those compromise-effect models or findings in its core argument, and the matched evidence is only a single DOI hit with no in-text context provided. This pattern is most consistent with an incidental/background mention.
